name: Cauliflower & Potato Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat and add the mustard seeds and green chillies.
Allow them to sizzle for a few seconds.
2. Add the cauliflower and potatoes and stir for 1-2 minutes.
3. Reduce the heat to medium-low, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the salt, increase the heat, and continuously stir until the vegetables are tender.
